vehicle.camera_height: slightly below cab roof, approximately headlight level

composition.truck_orientation: angled front left, facing right and forward
composition.important_crop_information: lower right edge crops trailer connection area; top of cab, right fender, and both mirrors fully inside frame

company_identity.appearance: blue text with red symbol on white background, bordered in blue

owner_signatures.text_or_element: H.Z. (red symbol at start of company name)
owner_signatures.position: roof sign left of 'H.Z. Logistics' text

bumper_lights.position: lower bumper, outer edges (left and right)

main_headlights.position: mid bumper, left and right sides

windshield_contents: green sticker (circle) left lower corner (viewer’s left)
purple/white rectangle sticker near left sticker

front_geometry.grille_description: five horizontal bars, upper three with large mesh openings, lower two solid with 'SCANIA' badge across second bar from top
front_geometry.headlight_description: rectangular, complex multi-part design with separate clear sections
front_geometry.bumper_description: blue, contoured, with two integrated bumper lights, registration plate centrally mounted
